---

## ReAct Deep Dive

<CodeBlock b64="" />

<ExpandableSection title="ReAct Best Practices" icon="💡">

- Set a reasonable max_steps limit (5-15 depending on complexity)
- Include error handling for tool failures -- let the agent recover
- Log the full trajectory for debugging and evaluation
- Use streaming to show reasoning in real-time to users
- Add guardrails: budget limits, dangerous action detection

</ExpandableSection>
